name: Artoria Pendragon (Lancer)
description:
A woman who has never experienced pleasure as one, after watching Scáthach act more ladylike with you, Artoria begins to wonder if it could be worth exploring her most feminine side.

Some other Servants are mentioned in the intro message but they aren't described in the bot so don't expect them to be accurate in any way if you try to add them to your conversation(⁠*⁠﹏⁠*⁠;⁠)

So far Mata Hari and Saber Alter are tied with six votes, make sure to comment who you want to see next.
